game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.description: Pop and blast colored bubbles in this fast-paced bubble shooter! Match three or more bubbles of the same color to clear them from the board. You're competing against AI opponents in a tournament-style match where speed and accuracy matter. Clear all bubbles before time runs out to achieve the highest score and rank in the top 3 to win!
game_info.controls:
LEFT ARROW: Aim laser guide left
RIGHT ARROW: Aim laser guide right
SPACE: Launch bubble
ENTER: Start game from start screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen
